## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's business model, growth strategy, and unique value proposition with new team members.](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown from $2.9M to \~$7M ARR profitably, aiming for $23M ARR by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Unique model combines AI-powered workflows, human expertise, and continuous learning](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Strong market demand with 48% win rate, 29-day sales cycle, $158K avg. deal size](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Competitive advantage: high-value services, proprietary tech, industry-leading talent](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Financial Health

  - [Grew from $2.9M ARR in Q4 to \~$7M ARR currently without burning cash](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Projecting growth to $23M ARR this year with $5-6M burn (4x growth efficiency)](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Raised at a conservative valuation to keep employee stock option costs low](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Transparent financials shared company-wide](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Business Model and Value Proposition

  - [Combines strategy, tech, and human expertise to deliver high-value services](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - ["AI workflow as code" approach: configurable, adaptable, and continuously learning](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Services-first model allows for rapid iteration and product development](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Addressing $500B+ market opportunity in knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### Sales and Customer Acquisition

  - [158 deals generated ($22M pipeline), 15M closed, 48% win rate](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [29-day average sales cycle, $158K average deal size](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Primarily inbound leads, no dedicated sales team (yet)](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Currently doing 2 kickoffs/week, aiming for 4/week by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

### Talent Strategy and Company Culture

  - [Hiring top industry talent as subject matter experts and team leads](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Emphasis on agency, proactivity, and raising the bar for colleagues](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [International hiring to access global talent pool and build capacity](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

### Future Plans and Investor Interest

  - [Aiming for Series B later this year](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Strong interest from top-tier VCs (Iconic, Bessemer, A16Z, Kleiner)](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Potential to expose workflows as APIs and monetize the platform](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

## Next Steps

  - Schedule follow-up meeting next week to continue discussions
  - Marília and Tucker to send any additional questions to Marcel
  - [Marcel to continue sharing company updates and vision through Notion and team communications](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Team to focus on executing current demand and maintaining service quality to support growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/oZYqyoiyT3ev3tnqPtqMUoAVQuvY3sg9?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
